debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
hn : 1 < n
⊢ ↑n.factorial > chapter2.e * (↑n / chapter2.e) ^ n

failed_attempts:
induction' n using Nat.le_induction with n h1 ih
  · have h_e : 2 < e := add_one_lt_exp 1
    rw [Nat.factorial_two, Nat.cast_ofNat]
    have : 0 < e := exp_pos 1
    field_simp
    linarith
  · have h_n_pos : 0 < (n : ℝ) := by positivity
    have h_e_gt_pow : ((n + 1 : ℝ) / n) ^ n < e := by
      have : 1 + 1/n < exp (1/n) := add_one_lt_exp (1/n)
      have h_pos : 0 < 1 + 1/n := by positivity
      have h2 := pow_lt_pow_left this h_pos.le (by positivity : 0 < n)
      rwa [exp_nat_pow, mul_one_div_cancel h_n_pos.ne'] at h2
    calc
      ↑(n + 1).factorial = (n + 1) * ↑n.factorial := by
        rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]
      _ > (n + 1) * (e * (n / e) ^ n) := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left ih (by positivity)
      _ = (n + 1) * e * n ^ n / e ^ n := by rw [div_pow, mul_assoc, mul_assoc]
      _ > (n + 1) * (n + 1) ^ n / e ^ n := by
        gcongr
        rwa [lt_div_iff' (pow_pos h_n_pos n)] at h_e_gt_pow
      _ = (n + 1) ^ (n + 1) / e ^ n := by rw [← pow_succ]
      _ = e * (n + 1) ^ (n + 1) / e ^ (n + 1) := by
        rw [pow_succ e n, ← div_div, mul_div_cancel_left _ (exp_pos 1).ne']
      _ = e * ((n + 1) / e) ^ (n + 1) := by rw [div_pow]

  · intro i hi
    have hk : 0 < (i + 1 : ℝ) := by positivity

    calc g (i + 2) - g (i + 1)

    _ = (i + 1) * log ((i + 2) / (i + 1)) + log (i + 2) - 1 := by rw [log_div (by positivity) hk.ne']; ring

    _ = log (i + 2) := by rw [mul_one_div, div_self hk.ne']; ring
  · rw [← Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_of_lt hn), Finset.sum_range_succ', log_one, zero_add]

simp; field_simp [hx.ne']
  have h_lt : ∀ i ∈ Finset.Icc 2 n, f i - f (i - 1) < log i := by
    intro i hi
    have hi1 : (0 : ℝ) < i - 1 := by norm_cast; omega
    obtain ⟨xi, hxi, hxi'⟩ := exists_deriv_eq_slope f log (by linarith)
      (fun x hx => (hf x (hi1.trans_le hx.1)).continuousWithinAt) (fun x hx => hf x (hi1.trans hx.1))
    norm_cast at hxi'; rw [Nat.cast_sub (show 1 ≤ i by linarith), sub_sub_self, div_one] at hxi'
    rw [← hxi']; exact log_lt_log (hi1.trans hxi.1) hxi.2
  have h_sum : f n - f 1 < log n.factorial := by
    rw [Nat.factorial_eq_prod_Icc, Nat.cast_prod, log_prod (fun i hi => Nat.cast_pos.2 (Finset.mem_Icc.1 hi).1),
      Finset.sum_eq_sum_Icc_succ_top hn, log_one, zero_add, ← Finset.sum_Icc_succ_sub f 1 (n - 1),
      ← Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_of_lt hn)]
    simp only [Nat.cast_sub (le_of_lt hn), add_sub_cancel, Nat.cast_one]
    refine Finset.sum_lt_sum (fun i hi => ?_) (Finset.nonempty_Icc.2 (le_of_lt hn))
    exact h_lt (i + 1) (by rw [Finset.mem_Icc] at hi ⊢; omega)
  have : exp (f n - f 1) = e * (n / e) ^ n := by
    have he : 0 < e := exp_pos 1
    have hn0 : 0 < (n : ℝ) := Nat.cast_pos.2 (pos_of_gt hn)
    rw [f, f, log_one, mul_zero, sub_zero, sub_neg_eq_add, add_comm, ← exp_add, log_exp 1,
      exp_nat_mul_log (div_pos hn0 he), log_div hn0.ne' he.ne', log_exp 1]
    simp [e]; ring
  rw [← this, ← exp_log (Nat.cast_pos.2 (Nat.factorial_pos n))]
  exact exp_lt_exp.2 h_sum

simp [he, Nat.factorial]
    field_simp [exp_pos]
    linarith [exp_one_gt_two]
  · have n_pos : 0 < (n : ℝ) := by positivity
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.cast_mul]
    refine lt_of_le_of_lt ?_ (mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left n_ih (by positivity))
    have he : e = exp 1 := rfl
    rw [he, div_pow, div_pow, pow_succ, ← mul_assoc, mul_comm (exp 1)]

    gcongr
    rw [mul_comm, ← div_le_iff' (pow_pos n_pos n), ← div_pow, add_div, div_self n_pos.ne']
    calc (1 + 1 / (n : ℝ)) ^ n ≤ (exp (1 / (n : ℝ))) ^ n := by gcongr; exact add_one_le_exp _
      _ = exp (1 / (n : ℝ) * n) := by rw [exp_nat_mul]
      _ = exp 1 := by rw [div_mul_cancel _ n_pos.ne']

simp only [factorial_two, cast_ofNat, e]
    rw [div_pow, pow_two, ← mul_div_assoc, div_self e_pos.ne', mul_one]
    refine (lt_div_iff e_pos).mpr ?_
    exact (mul_lt_mul_left (by norm_num)).mpr (add_one_lt_exp one_ne_zero)
  | succ n hn ih =>
    have e_pos : 0 < e := exp_pos 1
    have n_pos : 0 < (n : ℝ) := by norm_cast; exact (Nat.lt_trans (by norm_num) hn)
    have n1_pos : 0 < (n + 1 : ℝ) := by norm_cast; exact n.succ_pos

      ← div_pow, add_div, div_self n_pos.ne']
    exact (pow_le_pow_left (by positivity) (add_one_le_exp (1 / n)) n).trans
      (by rw [← exp_nat_mul, one_div_mul_cancel n_pos.ne', exp_one])

simp [Nat.factorial_succ, e, pow_two]
    field_simp [exp_pos]
    exact (mul_lt_mul_left (by norm_num)).mpr this
  | step k hk ih =>
    have e_pos : 0 < e := exp_pos 1
    have k_pos : 0 < (k : ℝ) := by positivity
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]
    refine (mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left ih (by positivity)).trans_le ?_
    field_simp [e_pos, k_pos]
    rw [pow_succ (k + 1 : ℝ) k, pow_succ e k]
    field_simp [e_pos, k_pos]
    refine (mul_le_mul_left (by positivity)).mpr ?_
    rw [← div_pow, add_div, div_self k_pos.ne']
    calc
      (1 + 1 / (k : ℝ)) ^ k ≤ (exp (1 / (k : ℝ))) ^ k := pow_le_pow_left (by positivity) (one_add_le_exp (1 / (k : ℝ))) k
      _ = exp (k * (1 / (k : ℝ))) := by rw [← exp_nat_mul]
      _ = exp 1 := by rw [mul_one_div_cancel k_pos.ne']
      _ = e := rfl

induction' n, hn using Nat.le_induction with n hn IH
  · rw [Nat.factorial_two, Nat.cast_two, pow_two, div_pow, e]

    rw [pow_succ, div_pow, div_pow, e]

    exact Real.add_one_div_pow_le_exp n

simp [Nat.factorial, e, div_pow, pow_two]
    exact this
  · have n_pos : 0 < (n : ℝ) := by positivity
    have h_e : (1 + 1 / (n : ℝ)) ^ n < e := by
      calc (1 + 1 / (n : ℝ)) ^ n < (exp (1 / n)) ^ n := by
             refine' pow_lt_pow_left₀ (by positivity) _ (by positivity)
             exact exp_gt_one_add (1 / n) (by positivity).ne'
           _ = exp (n • (1 / n)) := by rw [exp_nsmul]
           _ = exp 1 := by rw [nsmul_eq_mul, mul_one_div_cancel n_pos.ne']
           _ = e := by rw [e]
    calc (↑(n + 1).factorial : ℝ)
      = (n + 1) * ↑n.factorial := by rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.cast_mul]
    _ > (n + 1) * (e * (n / e) ^ n) := by gcongr
    _ = (n + 1) * n ^ n * e / e ^ n := by field_simp [e, (exp_pos 1).ne']; ring
    _ > (n + 1) * (n + 1) ^ n / e ^ n := by
      refine' div_lt_div_of_pos_right (pow_pos (exp_pos 1) n) ?_
      rw [mul_assoc, mul_lt_mul_left (by positivity), ← div_lt_iff (pow_pos n_pos n)]
      simpa [add_div] using h_e
    _ = e * ((n + 1) / e) ^ (n + 1) := by field_simp [e, (exp_pos 1).ne', pow_succ]; ring

strictConvexOn_xlogx.subset (Set.Ioi_subset_Ici (Set.subset_refl _)) (convex_Ioi 0)
  have hg_deriv : DerivableOn ℝ g (Set.Ioi 0) := fun x hx => derivable_at_id.mul (derivable_at_log hx.ne')
  have h_slope : ∀ k : ℕ, g (k + 2) - g (k + 1) < log (k + 2) + 1 := by
    intro k
    have h1 : (k + 1 : ℝ) < k + 2 := by norm_num
    have h_k1 : (k + 1 : ℝ) ∈ Set.Ioi 0 := by positivity
    have h_k2 : (k + 2 : ℝ) ∈ Set.Ioi 0 := by positivity
    have := hg.slope_lt_deriv hg_deriv h_k1 h_k2 h1
    rwa [add_sub_add_right_eq_sub, add_sub_cancel_left, div_one, deriv_x_mul_log h_k2.ne'] at this
  have h_sum := Finset.sum_lt_sum (fun k _ => h_slope k) (Finset.nonempty_range.mpr (Nat.le_sub_one_of_lt hn)).ne_empty
  rw [Finset.sum_range_sub (fun k => g (k + 1)), Finset.sum_add_distrib, Finset.sum_const, Finset.card_range, Nat.cast_sub hn.le,
      mul_one, Nat.factorial_eq_prod_range, Nat.cast_prod, log_prod] at h_sum
  · simp only [g, Nat.cast_one, log_one, mul_one, sub_zero, Finset.sum_range_succ', Nat.cast_zero, log_one, zero_add] at h_sum
    linarith
  · intro i _; positivity

succ m hm ih =>
      exact ih.trans (hf m (one_le_two.trans hm))

  · have n_pos : 0 < (n : ℝ) := by positivity

    calc
      ((n + 1).factorial : ℝ) = (n + 1) * n.factorial := by rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]
      _ > (n + 1) * (e * (n / e) ^ n) := by gcongr

        rw [pow_succ e n, mul_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_assoc, mul_le_mul_left (pow_pos e_pos n)]

        rw [← div_le_iff (pow_pos n_pos n), ← div_pow, (by field_simp : (n + 1 : ℝ) / n = 1 + 1 / n)]
        rw [← log_le_log_iff (pow_pos (by positivity) n) e_pos, log_pow, log_exp 1, ← le_div_iff (by positivity)]
        exact Real.log_add_one_le_x (1 / n)

succ n hn IH =>
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_add_one]
    refine lt_of_le_of_lt ?_ (mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left IH (by positivity))
    have : (1 + 1 / (n : ℝ)) ^ n ≤ e :=
      (pow_le_pow_left (by positivity) (exp_ge_add_one_self _) _).trans
        (by rw [← exp_nat_mul, div_mul_cancel _ (by positivity)]; rfl)
    field_simp [e]
    rw [pow_succ, mul_assoc, ← pow_succ, div_le_div_iff (pow_pos (exp_pos 1) n) (pow_pos (exp_pos 1) (n + 1))]
    rw [mul_right_comm, ← pow_succ, mul_comm e, ← mul_assoc, ← mul_assoc, mul_assoc e]
    refine mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right ?_ (by positivity)
    rw [← div_le_iff (pow_pos (by positivity) n), ← div_pow, (by field_simp : ((n : ℝ) + 1) / n = 1 + 1 / n)]
    exact this

strictConvexOn_of_deriv_strict_mono (convex_Ioi 0) hf_deriv strictMonoOn_log
  have h_n_pos : 0 < (n : ℝ) := by positivity
  have h_fact_pos : 0 < (n.factorial : ℝ) := by positivity
  rw [← log_lt_log_iff h_fact_pos (by positivity), log_mul (exp_pos 1).ne' (by positivity),
    log_pow, log_div h_n_pos.ne' (exp_pos 1).ne', log_exp 1, ← Nat.cast_factorial,
    Nat.factorial_eq_prod_Icc_id, Nat.cast_prod, log_prod (fun i hi => by positivity)]
  rw [Finset.sum_Icc_succ_bottom (Nat.one_le_of_lt hn), log_one, zero_add, sub_mul, one_mul]
  have : f n - f 1 < ∑ i in Finset.Icc 2 n, log i := by
    rw [← Finset.sum_Icc_sub f (Nat.one_le_of_lt hn)]
    refine Finset.sum_lt_sum (fun i hi => ?_) ⟨n, Finset.mem_Icc.mpr ⟨hn, le_refl n⟩, ?_⟩
    all_goals
      rw [Finset.mem_Icc] at *
      have := hf_convex.add_deriv_lt_f hf_deriv (by positivity) (by linarith) (by linarith)
      linarith
  have hf1 : f 1 = -1 := by simp [f, log_one]
  have hfn : f n = n * log n - n := rfl
  linarith

simp [Nat.factorial, e]
    field_simp [exp_pos]
    rw [← exp_one_pow 2, ← e]
    calc
      4 = 2 * 2 := by norm_num
      _ < 2 * e := (mul_lt_mul_left (by norm_num)).mpr h_e
  · rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.cast_mul]
    refine (mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left n_ih (by positivity)).trans_le ?_
    field_simp [e, exp_pos]
    rw [← exp_one_pow n, ← exp_one_pow (n + 1), ← e, mul_comm _ e, mul_assoc, ← pow_succ,
      mul_comm (e ^ (n + 1))]
    gcongr
    rw [← div_le_iff (by positivity), ← div_pow, add_div, div_self (by positivity), e,
      ← rpow_natCast]
    exact add_one_div_pow_le_exp (n : ℝ)

induction' n, hn using Nat.le_induction with n hn' ih
  · rw [e, (by norm_num : ((2 : ℕ).factorial : ℝ) = 2)]
    field_simp [exp_pos]
    exact (lt_div_iff (exp_pos 1)).mpr ((mul_lt_mul_right (by norm_num)).mpr exp_one_gt_two)
  · rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.cast_mul]
    refine' lt_of_le_of_lt _ (mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left ih (by positivity))
    field_simp [e, exp_pos, (by positivity : (n : ℝ) > 0)]
    rw [pow_succ (n + 1 : ℝ) n, ← mul_assoc, mul_div_assoc, div_self (by positivity), mul_one, ← div_pow]
    refine' (log_le_iff_le_exp (pow_pos (div_pos (by positivity) (by positivity)) n) 1).mp _
    rw [log_pow, ← mul_one_div_cancel (by positivity : (n : ℝ) ≠ 0)]
    exact mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left (log_add_one_lt_self _ (by positivity)).le (by positivity)

simp only [e, factorial_two, Nat.cast_ofNat, Nat.cast_two, pow_two, div_pow]
    rw [mul_div, div_lt_iff (by positivity), pow_two, ← mul_assoc, mul_lt_mul_left (exp_pos 1)]
    linarith [add_one_lt_exp 1 (by norm_num)]
  · rw [factorial_succ, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_add_one]
    refine (mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left IH (by positivity)).trans_le ?_
    simp only [e, div_pow, ← pow_succ]
    rw [div_le_div_iff (pow_pos (exp_pos 1) n) (pow_pos (exp_pos 1) (n + 1))]
    rw [pow_succ (exp 1), ← mul_assoc, mul_comm (exp 1), mul_assoc, mul_assoc]
    refine mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right ?_ (pow_pos (exp_pos 1) n).le
    rw [pow_succ (↑n + 1), ← mul_assoc, mul_comm (exp 1), mul_assoc]
    refine mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_left ?_ (by positivity)
    rw [← le_div_iff (pow_pos (by positivity) n), ← div_pow, add_div, div_self (by positivity)]
    exact one_add_div_pow_le_exp 1 n

simp [e, div_pow, Nat.factorial]
    field_simp [exp_pos]
    rw [lt_div_iff (exp_pos 1), mul_comm, ← lt_div_iff' (by norm_num : (0 : ℝ) < 2)]
    norm_num
    exact Real.two_lt_exp_one
  · have n_pos : 0 < (n : ℝ) := by positivity
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.cast_mul]
    refine (mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left IH (by positivity)).trans_le ?_
    rw [pow_succ, ← mul_assoc, field_simp [e, exp_pos]]
    rw [div_le_div_right (pow_pos (exp_pos 1) n)]
    rw [mul_assoc, mul_comm e, ← mul_assoc, mul_le_mul_left (by positivity)]
    rw [← le_div_iff (pow_pos n_pos n), ← div_pow, ← add_div, div_self n_pos.ne']
    rw [← Real.log_le_log_iff (pow_pos (by positivity) _) (exp_pos 1), Real.log_pow, Real.log_exp, ← e]
    calc
      (n : ℝ) * Real.log (1 + 1 / n) ≤ n * (1 / n) := by
        gcongr; apply Real.log_le_sub_one_of_pos; positivity
      _ = 1 := by field_simp

simp
  rw [← Nat.sub_add_cancel (one_le_of_lt hn), Finset.sum_range_succ' (fun i => log (i + 1)),
    log_one, zero_add] at this
  simp [f, log_one] at this; linarith

induction' n, hn using Nat.le_induction with n hn IH
  · rw [Nat.factorial_two, Nat.cast_ofNat]
    have h_epos : 0 < e := by rw [e]; exact exp_pos 1
    field_simp [h_epos.ne', div_pow]
    rw [mul_lt_mul_left h_epos, ← pow_succ, pow_one]
    linarith [exp_one_gt_two]
  · rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]
    have h_epos : 0 < e := by rw [e]; exact exp_pos 1
    calc
      ((n + 1 : ℝ) * n.factorial) > (n + 1 : ℝ) * (e * (n / e) ^ n) :=
        (mul_lt_mul_left (by positivity)).mpr IH
      _ = (n + 1 : ℝ) * (n : ℝ) ^ n * e / e ^ n := by rw [div_pow]; ring
      _ ≥ (n + 1 : ℝ) * (n + 1 : ℝ) ^ n / e ^ n := by
        gcongr
        rw [e, ← div_le_iff (by positivity), ← one_add_one_div (by positivity)]
        exact one_add_one_div_pow_le_exp n
      _ = e * ((n + 1 : ℝ) / e) ^ (n + 1) := by
        rw [div_pow, pow_succ, mul_div_assoc, mul_div_cancel_left _ h_epos.ne']

simpa [Nat.factorial_two]
  | succ n h2 IH =>
    have e_pos : 0 < e := by rw [e]; exact exp_pos 1
    have n_pos : 0 < (n : ℝ) := by positivity
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_add, Nat.cast_one]
    calc
      (n + 1 : ℝ) * n.factorial > (n + 1) * (e * (n / e) ^ n) := mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left IH (by positivity)
      _ ≥ e * ((n + 1) / e) ^ (n + 1) := by
        field_simp [e_pos, n_pos]
        rw [pow_succ _ n, mul_comm (n + 1 : ℝ), ← mul_assoc]
        gcongr
        rw [← div_le_iff' (pow_pos n_pos n), ← div_pow, add_div, div_self n_pos.ne', add_comm, e]
        exact add_one_div_pow_le_exp n

succ n hn' ih =>
    have n_pos : 0 < (n : ℝ) := by positivity
    rw [Nat.factorial_succ, Nat.cast_mul]
    refine (mul_lt_mul_of_pos_left ih (by positivity)).trans_le ?_
    simp [e, div_pow, pow_succ]
    field_simp [exp_pos 1, n_pos]
    rw [pow_succ (n + 1 : ℝ) n, mul_comm]
    gcongr
    rw [← div_pow, add_div, div_self n_pos.ne']
    exact add_one_div_pow_le_exp 1 n

succ n hn' ih =>
    have h_pos : 0 < (n : ℝ) := by positivity
    have h_e : (1 + 1 / n) ^ n < e := by
      have h1 := exp_gt_one_add_x (x := 1 / (n : ℝ)) (by positivity)
      have h2 := pow_lt_pow_left (by positivity) h1 (by omega)
      rwa [e, ← exp_nat_cast_mul, one_div_mul_cancel h_pos.ne'] at h2
    rw [factorial_succ, Nat.cast_mul, pow_succ, div_pow, ← mul_div_assoc, mul_assoc]
    refine' (mul_lt_mul_left (by positivity)).mpr (ih.trans_le _)
    rw [div_pow, div_pow, ← mul_div_assoc, ← mul_div_assoc]
    refine' (mul_le_mul_right (by positivity)).mpr _
    rw [← div_le_iff' (pow_pos h_pos n), ← div_pow]
    exact h_e.le
